# Runtime Artifacts (R0–R12)

**Status:** Frozen baseline v1.0.0 + R12 Situation Policy Catalog (2026-07-14). See `../RELEASE.md`.

**Generated by P0 distillation.** Do not hand-edit — change `distillation/sources/` and re-run the build only when validation proves an artifact gap.

```bash
pip install pyyaml
python coordination_layer/distillation/build.py
```

## Bundle

| ID | File | Purpose |
|----|------|---------|
| R0 | `manifest.json` | Versions, checksums, provenance |
| R1 | `project_situation_model.schema.json` | PSM JSON Schema |
| R2 | `capability_graph.v1.yaml` | T1 capability contracts (public API) |
| R3 | `cluster_registry.v1.yaml` | 24 clusters → playbooks |
| R4 | `playbook_templates.v1.yaml` | 8 playbooks |
| R5 | `invariant_registry.v1.yaml` | Hard rules (AGENT_GUIDE) |
| R6 | `replan_registry.v1.yaml` | Global replan triggers |
| R7 | `decision_heuristics.v1.yaml` | Routing heuristics |
| R8 | `tool_bindings.v1.yaml` | Capability → MCP tools |
| R9 | `anti_patterns.v1.yaml` | Situation-driven blocks |
| R10 | `evidence_lattice.v1.yaml` | Evidence posture transitions |
| R11 | `state_lexicon.v1.json` | Research state telemetry (never control flow) |
| R12 | `situation_policy_catalog.v1.yaml` | Engineering Investment / EQG / ROI policies (no leaf IDs) |

## Architecture principles (frozen)

- **Capabilities, not modules** — modules register contracts in R2
- **Host LLM sole reasoner** — coordinator is deterministic and advisory
- **150 research states** — distilled to clusters + lexicon + **situation policies (R12)**; never leaf FSM control flow
- **Stable capability IDs** — tool changes go through R8 only
- **Engineering Investment** — R12 + lifecycle bands allocate effort; maximize quality per second

## Implementation (P1)

Production coordinator code lives in `src/navigation/coordination_intelligence/`:

- **PSM Runtime** (`psm/runtime.py`) — single source of truth (not a separate Evidence Store)
- **Capability Router**, **Playbook Selector**, **Step Compiler**, **Loop Governor** — operate only on PSM Runtime
- **Additive MCP tools:** `perception_coordinator_episode_start`, `perception_coordinator_apply_envelope`, `perception_coordinator_briefing`

## Execution Runtime (E1)

Deterministic tool execution beneath the coordinator — `src/navigation/execution_runtime/`:

- **Dispatch Registry** — shared handler map (MCP server + in-process executor)
- **Tool Executor** — `execute(compiled_step)` public API
- **Execution Ledger** — append-only invocation records

See `docs/EXECUTION_RUNTIME.md`.

Existing `perception_*` tools are unchanged. Host LLM calls coordinator tools alongside standard MCP tools.

## P2 — Invisible integration

Every MCP tool response (except explicit `perception_coordinator_*` tools) passes through `CoordinatorBridge` in `server.py`:

- **Auto PSM update** after each tool execution (via session-bound episode)
- **Auto briefing** attached additively under `data.coordinator`
- **Auto playbook advancement** via Loop Governor when evidence satisfies the step
- **Cluster resolver** infers `cluster.*` from evidence and tool signals (never research state IDs)

Disable with `COORDINATION_DISABLED=1` for exact legacy envelope behavior.

## Validation phase (CVW-01 .. CVW-14)

**Regression gate** — 14/14 must pass. See `../RELEASE.md`.

```bash
python src/run_coordination_validation.py
```
